description: Unofficial local-first MCP server for Apple Health export data.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/apple-health-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Path to export.xml, an Apple Health export directory, or export.zip.
environmentVariables.name: APPLE_HEALTH_EXPORT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: IANA timezone used to interpret daily and weekly local-day summaries.
environmentVariables.name: APPLE_HEALTH_TIMEZONE

environmentVariables.description: summary, structured, or raw. Defaults to summary.
environmentVariables.name: APPLE_HEALTH_PRIVACY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Optional folder watched for new Apple Health exports; the newest is auto-promoted and summaries refreshed.
environmentVariables.name: APPLE_HEALTH_WATCH_PATH
